calculateL2TokenAddress(address).details: the L1 and L2 address oracles may not always be in sync. For example, a custom token may have been registered but not deployed or the contract self destructed.

returns._0: L2 address of a bridged ERC20 token

calculateL2TokenAddress(address).notice: Calculate the address used when bridging an ERC20 token
